mapper.select: SELECT b.id as bookId, b.title as bookTitle, b.author as author, b.cover_url as coverImage, -- 基于行为类型计算分数 SUM( CASE WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_COLLECT' THEN 5.0 WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_LIKE' THEN 3.0 WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_REVIEW' THEN 4.0 WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_VIEW' THEN 0.5 ELSE 1.0 END ) as score, '基于用户行为推荐' as reason FROM user_behavior_log ubl INNER JOIN book b ON ubl.target_id = b.id WHERE ubl.user_id = #{userId} AND ubl.target_type = 'BOOK' AND ubl.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) -- 最近30天的行为 GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.author, b.cover_url HAVING score > 1.0 -- 只推荐有较高分数的书籍 ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.id as bookId, b.title as bookTitle, b.author as author, b.cover_url as coverImage, -- 基于用户行为计算热度分数 COUNT(*) * 0.1 + -- 行为次数权重（降低到10%） SUM( CASE WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_COLLECT' THEN 5 WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_LIKE' THEN 3 WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_REVIEW' THEN 4 WHEN ubl.behavior_type = 'BOOK_VIEW' THEN 0.5 -- 浏览行为权重降低 ELSE 1 END ) * 0.9 as score, '热门推荐' as reason FROM user_behavior_log ubl INNER JOIN book b ON ubl.target_id = b.id WHERE ubl.target_type = 'BOOK' AND ubl.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) -- 最近7天的行为 GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.author, b.cover_url HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 -- 至少5次行为 ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM user_behavior_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minActions} ORDER BY MAX(create_time) DESC, COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10000
